title: SGNL AnalysisReport
description: Output schema for `sgnl analyze <url> --output json`. Contains performance, SEO, structure, content analysis, schema validation, robots.txt analysis, and full Python analysis detail.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the analysis was performed.

crawlable.description: Whether the page is crawlable (not blocked by robots, not 4xx/5xx).

https.description: Whether the page is served over HTTPS.

scores.description: Composite scores (0-100) across all analysis dimensions.

overall_score.description: Weighted overall score: 15% CWV + 10% Speed + 20% Technical SEO + 20% On-Page SEO + 15% Structure + 20% Content.

score.description: SEO composite: equally weighted technical + on-page + content.

content.description: Content analysis sub-score (0-100). From Python content_analysis.py.

breakdown.description: Weight coefficients used to calculate overall_score.

performance.description: Raw performance metrics from CrUX field data, PSI lab data, and HTTP fetch.

core_web_vitals.description: Real-user field metrics (CrUX API or PSI loadingExperience). All optional — null if no field data available.

lcp_ms.description: Largest Contentful Paint in ms. Good: <=2500, Poor: >4000.

fcp_ms.description: First Contentful Paint in ms. Good: <=1800.

cls.description: Cumulative Layout Shift score. Good: <=0.1, Poor: >0.25.

inp_ms.description: Interaction to Next Paint in ms. Good: <=200, Poor: >500.

fid_ms.description: First Input Delay in ms. Good: <=100, Poor: >300.

speed_metrics.description: Speed metrics from HTTP fetch and Lighthouse lab run.

ttfb_ms.description: Time to First Byte in ms (measured from fetch).

resource_summary.description: Page weight breakdown by resource type (from Lighthouse resource-summary audit).

other_bytes.description: Other resources (documents, media, etc.) in bytes.

seo.description: SEO signals extracted from HTML and Python analysis.

schema_count.description: Number of JSON-LD schema blocks found (from schema_validator.py).

open_graph.description: Whether Open Graph tags are present.

twitter_card.description: Whether Twitter Card tags are present.

indexable.description: Whether the page allows indexing (no noindex).

word_count.description: Approximate word count of visible text.

headings_valid.description: Whether heading hierarchy is valid (single H1, no skipped levels).

images_alt_missing.description: Images missing alt attribute entirely (excludes empty alt="" decorative images).

generic_anchor_text.description: Internal links with generic anchor text ('click here', 'read more', etc.).

structure.description: DOM structure quality metrics from xray.py.

div_ratio.description: Ratio of <div> elements to total (0-1). Lower is better.

semantic_score.description: Count of semantic HTML5 elements used (main, header, footer, nav, article, section, aside).

critical.description: Blocking issues: HTTP errors, not indexable, missing title, no HTTPS, TTI >10s, thin content.

warning.description: Important issues: poor CWV, missing description, missing alt text, TBT >300ms, TTFB >600ms, no sitemap, accessibility issues, render-blocking resources.

info.description: Informational: low word count, high div ratio, no schema, missing Permissions-Policy, missing image dimensions, inline styles, no published_time, low modern image %, empty elements.

robots.description: Robots.txt analysis from robots_check.py. Present when robots.txt is reachable.

disallow_rules.description: Disallow rules for the relevant user-agent (capped at 20).

crawl_delay.description: Crawl-delay value in seconds, or null if not set.

schema_validation.description: Schema.org JSON-LD validation from schema_validator.py. Validates blocks, checks Google Rich Results eligibility, scores markup.

score.description: Overall schema markup score (average of per-block scores).

blocks_found.description: Number of JSON-LD blocks found (including @graph items).

rich_results_eligible.description: Types eligible for Google Rich Results.

recommendations.description: Actionable recommendations to improve schema markup.

content_analysis.description: Content quality analysis from Python content_analysis.py. Present when Python layer runs successfully.

freshness_status.description: Content freshness based on date references.

anchor_quality_score.description: Quality of internal link anchor text.

snippet_eligible.description: Whether content has concise answer blocks suitable for featured snippets.

analysis_detail.description: Full raw output from all Python analysis scripts. Contains all data collected — much more than the summarized fields above.

xray.description: Full xray.py output: DOM analysis, accessibility, SEO signals, links, images, forms, scripts, inline styles.

structure.description: Structure quality: div_ratio, semantic_score, heading counts, empty elements, duplicate IDs, deprecated tags, inline events, iframes.

head.description: Head audit: charset_present, viewport_present, favicon_present, preload_count.

content_ratios.description: Content ratios (computed from original HTML, not skeleton).

scripts.description: Script audit (computed from original HTML, not skeleton).

technical_seo.description: Full technical_seo.py output: meta tags, canonical, Open Graph, indexability, links, security headers, hreflang, pagination/AMP, URL structure.

onpage.description: Full onpage.py output: content metrics, heading details, link quality, image quality (alt, dimensions, modern formats, lazy loading).

content_analysis.description: Full content_analysis.py output: readability, top_keywords, detected_language, passive_voice, transition_words, CTA, TOC, author_bio, link_density, and more.
